doctrine: profitable + US + TTM-revenue-growth (anti-value-trap) + manageable-leverage + IN A DIP (price BELOW 200d SMA, drawdown from 52w high within floor) + strong-margins + positive-forward-earnings (0<fwdPE<cap, tighter for cheapness), then category leaders per GICS sub-industry (leadership measured vs the full universe), trimmed by composite rebound score (analyst upside + drawdown room + quality + balance-sheet survival).
